name: RenderContentSerializer
summary: Used to import and export custom render content such as materials, environments and textures. You must override RenderPlugIn.RenderContentSerializers() and return an array of derived RenderContentSerializer class types to add to the content browsers.

constructors.name: RenderContentSerializer
constructors.signature: protected RenderContentSerializer(string fileExtension, RenderContentKind contentKind, bool canRead, bool canWrite)
constructors.summary: Protected constructor to be called from derived class

params.name: fileExtension
params.doc: File extension associated with this serialize object

params.name: contentKind
params.doc: Kind of content created when importing or exporting this file type.

params.name: canRead
params.doc: If true then the file type can be imported and will be included in the file open box when importing the specified render content kind.

params.name: canWrite
params.doc: If true then the file type can be exported and will be included in the file save box when exporting the specified render content kind.

methods.name: CanLoadMultiple
methods.summary: If true the plug-in is capable of loading multiple contents.

methods.name: LoadMultiple
methods.signature: public virtual bool LoadMultiple(RhinoDoc doc, IEnumerable<string> fileNames, RenderContentKind contentKind, RenderContentSerializer.LoadMultipleFlags flags)
methods.summary: Create any number of new render contents loaded from any number of files.

params.name: fileNames
params.doc: A list of filenames to load from. Each file can contain any number of render contents.

params.name: contentKind
params.doc: Only used by I/O plug-ins that support multiple kinds. It tells the plug-in which content kind to create. If the plug-in only supports a single content kind, it can ignore this parameter.

params.name: flags
params.doc: A set of flags from the enum above.

methods.name: Read
methods.summary: Called to when importing a file, file should be parsed and converted to a valid RenderContent object.

params.name: pathToFile
params.doc: Full path of the file to load.

returns.doc: Returns a valid RenderContent object such as RenderMaterial if the file was successfully parsed otherwise returns null.

methods.name: ReportContentAndFile
methods.signature: public virtual void ReportContentAndFile(RenderContent renderContent, string pathToFile, int flags)
methods.summary: This is called from your implementation of LoadMultiple() to add a content and the file it was loaded from when the LoadMultipleFlags.Preload flag is NOT set. See LoadMultiple() for an explanation of this method's use.

params.name: renderContent
params.doc: Render content that was loaded from the file.

params.name: pathToFile
params.doc: Full path of the file that the render content was loaded from.

params.name: flags
params.doc: Flags for future use; should be passed as zero.

methods.name: ReportDeferredContentAndFile
methods.signature: public virtual void ReportDeferredContentAndFile(RenderContent renderContent, string pathToFile, int flags)
methods.summary: This is called from your implementation of LoadMultiple() to add a 'deferred' content and the file it will be loaded from, when the LoadMultipleFlags.Preload flag is set. See LoadMultiple() for an explanation of this method's use. \param c is the deferred content. \param wszFullPath is the full path to the file that 'c' will be loaded from. \param flags is reserved for future use; you should pass zero. \param pReserved is reserved for future use; you should pass nullptr. */

params.name: renderContent
params.doc: Deferred render content - represents all contents that will be loaded from the file.

params.name: pathToFile
params.doc: Full path of the file that render contents will be loaded from.

params.name: flags
params.doc: Flags for future use; should be passed as zero.

methods.name: Write
methods.signature: public abstract bool Write(string pathToFile, RenderContent renderContent, CreatePreviewEventArgs previewArgs)
methods.summary: Called to save a custom RenderContent object as an external file.

params.name: pathToFile
params.doc: Full path of file to write

params.name: previewArgs
params.doc: Parameters used to generate a preview image which may be embedded in the exported file.

properties.name: CanRead
properties.summary: If true then the file type can be imported and will be included in the file open box when importing the specified render content kind.

properties.name: CanWrite
properties.summary: If true then the file type can be exported and will be included in the file save box when exporting the specified render content kind.

properties.name: ContentKind
properties.summary: Kind of content created when importing or exporting this file type - ie, Material, Texture or Environment

properties.name: ContentType
properties.summary: Kind of content created when importing or exporting this file type. Obsolete - use ContentKind

properties.name: FileExtension
properties.summary: File extension associated with this serialize object
